arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola takes aim at Liverpool and Premier League rivals amid Man City 115 charges case
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has accused his Premier League rivals of holding a bias against Manchester City in their 115 charges battle with Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool & Real Madrid linked - Could Jamal Musiala leave Bayern Munich next season?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are under pressure to reach a number of necessary goals this season. First and foremost, new head coach Vincent Kompany must regain control in the Bundesliga and...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola right about 115 charges but Man City statement to be tested as Liverpool watch on
arts.sum: In this week's Blood Red column, Paul Gorst glances towards Manchester City's Monday court date over their 115 financial charges and what it could all mean for Liverpool

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Slot gives update on star trio’s contracts as new signing gets ‘annoyed’ warning
arts.sum: Liverpool manager has been answering questions on Mohamed Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Virgil van Dijk ahead of the Premier League game against Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Liverpool coach John Heitinga aims brutal dig at former club Everton at Reds training session
arts.sum: John Heitinga made 140 appearances for Everton, but he's now happy to poke fun at his former club in his new role as an assistant coach to Arne Slot at Liverpool

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Liverpool v Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs for Liverpool and Nottingham Forest The post FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Liverpool v Nottingham Forest appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: 'You can’t expect' - Arne Slot on key Liverpool men and why he's not worried about comments in media
arts.sum: Arne Slot opens up on his aim of developing his relationships with Virgil van Dijk and Mohamed Salah further at Liverpool

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag makes Casemiro's role clear after Liverpool nightmare and Manuel Ugarte move
arts.sum: Casemiro had a nightmare in Man Utd's 3-0 hiding to Liverpool, gifting them the opening two goals before being hooked at the break. Despite that - and the £50m arrival of Manuel Ugarte - Erik ten Hag has told him he still has a role to play this season

arts.ttl: Casemiro backed by Erik ten Hag after Liverpool horror show but is warned over his Man United future with Manuel Ugarte waiting in the wings
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has held talks with Casemiro over his horror show against Liverpool and the threat to his place from Manchester United's new £50.5million signing Manuel Ugarte.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals why Liverpool's demanding schedule is a POSITIVE and outlines how Reds can still improve after impressive start to the season
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp loved to have a dig at English football's power-brokers and broadcasters for the fixture pile-up - but his Anfield successor Arne Slot is keen to put a positive spin on it.
